checks.name: node --test test/worker.test.js
checks.evidence: Worker route tests verified ARCH-0.1 milestone search, ARCH-0.2 PRF milestone explain, ARCH-0.3 BGE explicit 501 limitation, and unknown milestone 404 behavior.

checks.name: node --test test/no-runtime-llm.test.js
checks.evidence: Live source scan confirmed no runtime generative provider dependencies were introduced.

checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: Node tests passed; MDE parser checked project JSON/JSONL files; traceability validator checked GEN-024 and milestone endpoint docs; fixture index check passed; fixture evaluation passed.

blocked_or_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
blocked_or_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; milestone endpoint changes remain local until explicit deploy approval.

blocked_or_skipped.name: Remote BGE runtime query validation
blocked_or_skipped.reason: The BGE milestone endpoint intentionally returns milestone_runtime_not_enabled until runtime query-vector support exists.

high_findings.summary: Remote OpenSearch BGE hybrid remains candidate-only until transferability, latency/cost, and promotion policy are addressed.

medium_findings.summary: Milestone endpoint aliases now expose the key architecture states through stable search and explain paths.

evidence_quality: GEN-024 exposes milestone comparison endpoints without changing the public/default search path or overstating BGE runtime readiness.
